properties.name: Villa A
properties.address: 1730 Clio Street, Villa A, New Orleans, LA 70113
properties.parking: Street parking available on Clio Street. Please follow posted signage.
properties.trash: Follow signs for "Trash" at the covered walkway at the entrance. Please bag all trash before disposing.
houseRules: Quiet hours 10 PM – 8 AM
No smoking indoors
No parties or events without prior approval
No pets unless pre-approved
Please use wall-safe tape for decorations
Lock all doors when leaving the property
checkoutInstructions: Check-out by 11:00 AM
Take all trash out
Turn off all lights and fans
Lock all doors and close all windows
Make sure the door is locked when you leave

pool.hours: Pool is open daily from 8 AM to 10 PM
pool.maintenance: Pool: Every Monday & Thursday (7:30 AM – 12 PM). Landscaping: Every other Thursday.
rules: No glass – broken glass requires draining the pool
No yelling, large speakers, or loud noises
Children must be supervised by an adult at all times
No pets in the pool, hot tub, or sauna
pool.hotTub: The hot tub is available for guest use. Please limit sessions to 30 minutes. Controls are located on the side panel.
pool.sauna: The sauna is available for guest use. Please limit sessions to 20 minutes. Ensure the door is fully closed during use.
pool.cabana: The cabana area is shared among all villas. Please clean up after use and return furniture to its original position.
pool.quietHours: 10 PM – 8 AM. Please be respectful of neighbors and other villa guests.

privateChefs.name: Chef Marc Bruckel
privateChefs.details: Available Fridays, Saturdays, and Sundays only.

privateChefs.name: Chef Evan Troxell
privateChefs.details: Gulf Coast Crawfish Co. — crawfish boils and seafood experiences.

crawfishBoil.name: Will's Catering
crawfishBoil.details: Contact Will to arrange on-site jambalaya and seafood boil.

crawfishBoil.name: Gulf Coast Crawfish Co.
crawfishBoil.details: Book an incredible crawfish boil experience with Evan!

hibachi.name: Hibachi2U
hibachi.details: Chef cooks for ~1.5 hours. Customer provides tables, chairs, plates and utensils — we bring the rest!

tourGuides.name: Two Chicks Walking Tours
tourGuides.details: $395 for private group tours up to 14 people!

tourGuides.name: Cajun Encounters (Swamp Tours)
tourGuides.details: Transport is available to the swamp ~35 minutes away.

tourGuides.name: New Orleans Ghosts (Ghost Tours)
tourGuides.details: All sorts of spooky tour packages are available.
